mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_POST.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_POST (ID, POST_TITLE, POST_CONTENT, MEMBER_ID, POST_READ_COUNT) VALUES (#{id}, #{postTitle}, #{postContent}, #{memberId}, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT P.ID, P.POST_TITLE, P.POST_CONTENT, P.MEMBER_ID, P.POST_READ_COUNT, M.MEMBER_EMAIL, M.MEMBER_NAME FROM TBL_POST P JOIN TBL_MEMBER M ON P.MEMBER_ID = M.ID ORDER BY P.ID DESC
SELECT P.ID, P.POST_TITLE, P.POST_CONTENT, P.MEMBER_ID, P.POST_READ_COUNT, M.MEMBER_EMAIL, M.MEMBER_NAME FROM TBL_POST P JOIN TBL_MEMBER M ON P.MEMBER_ID = M.ID WHERE P.ID = #{id}
